BOOTSTRAP_DRIVER.PRIMING_CONTEXT: keywords: "environment-discovery, handshake, ide-detection" hint: "Identifies the runtime environment and loads the appropriate IDE driver."
BOOTSTRAP_DRIVER.DETECTION_ALGORITHM: 1. Execute `env` command. 2. Analyze variables: CURSOR_AGENT, CLAUDE_CODE, __CFBundleIdentifier. 3. Match with /drivers/*.driver.xml. 4. IF config missing -> Trigger INSTALL_FLOW.
